title: structure editor
text: structure editor The runtime mechanism in a Uniface desktop application that understands events and ensures that all processing occurs correctly. It manages each edit session . The structure editor derives its name from the external data structure that exists when components contain data. Related Links edit session The period of time between activating and exiting a form whose exec operation either contains nothing or issues the edit ProcScript statement. Structure Editor The structure editor is the mechanism in Uniface that understands events in form components. The structure editor derives its name from the external data structure that exists when forms contain data. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
